entry.title: GL account not mantained for KTOPL GALF KTOGR 33000 AFABE 01 TYPE Acquisition: Down Payments
S4HANA New Service : Fiori app for Service order and Technician planning
entry.content:
Hello All, 

What is the fiori app for Service order and Technician planning? Similar to Customer Service app "Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planners" or "Manage Schedules" or "Maintenance Scheduling Board" etc. 

Thanks 

Bidhu

#service

CRM Service 

#CA-RSH-EAM

entry.title: "Could Not Load Content" Error in DevTools After BAS Deployment
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When I run a UI5 application deployed through the BAS IDE and try to inspect the code in DevTools > Sources, I get the following error for any controller I select:

Could not load content for https://xxxx.xxxx.net:40030/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/appName/~20250506134842~/controller/warehouseList-dbg.controller.js 
(HTTP error: status code 404, net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE)

Interestingly, if I made a change in a specific controller before deployment, the error doesn't appear for that one controller, only for the others.

I'm not sure if this is related to deployment settings or something else. I've never encountered this issue when deploying from SAP Web IDE.

Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks



Additional info:
- The deployed application is being run by direct link.
- It is deployed using npm in the terminal.

ui5-deploy.yaml

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: appName.appName
type: application
builder:
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**
  customTasks:
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        target:
          destination: GWD
          url: http://xxxx.xxxx.net:40030
          client: '020'
        app:
          name: ZappName
          description: Test.
          package: ZGW
          transport: GWDKxxxxx
        exclude:
          - /test/

package.json

{
  "name": "appName.appName",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "description": "",
  "devDependencies": {
    "@sap/ui5-builder-webide-extension": "1.1.x",
    "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling": "1",
    "@ui5/cli": "^4.0.12",
    "rimraf": "6.0.1"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build_old": "ui5 build --clean-dest --include-task=generateManifestBundle generateCachebusterInfo",
    "start": "fiori run --open \"test/flpSandbox.html?sap-client=020&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#app-tile\"",
    "start-local": "fiori run --config ./ui5-local.yaml --open \"test/flpSandboxMockServer.html?sap-client=020&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#app-tile\"",
    "start-noflp": "fiori run --open \"index.html?sap-client=020&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false\"",
    "start-variants-management": "fiori run --open \"preview.html?sap-client=020&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false&fiori-tools-rta-mode=true&sap-ui-rta-skip-flex-validation=true#preview-app\"",
    "build": "ui5 build -a --clean-dest --include-task=generateCachebusterInfo",
    "deploy": "npm run build && fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml && rimraf archive.zip",
    "deploy-config": "fiori add deploy-config",
    "start-mock": "fiori run --open \"test/flpSandboxMockServer.html?sap-client=020&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#app-tile\"",
    "suite-tests": "fiori run --open 'test/testsuite.qunit.html'",
    "unit-tests": "fiori run --open 'test/unit/unitTests.qunit.html'",
    "int-tests": "fiori run --open 'test/integration/opaTests.qunit.html'",
    "undeploy": "npm run build && fiori undeploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml",
    "deploy-test": "npm run build && fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml --testMode true"
  },
  "ui5": {
    "dependencies": [
      "@sap/ui5-builder-webide-extension"
    ]
  },
  "private": true,
  "sapuxLayer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "keywords": [
    "ui5",
    "openui5",
    "sapui5"
  ],
  "main": "webapp/index.html",
  "dependencies": {
    "deploy-config": "^1.0.5"
  }
}

entry.title: Receive Feed of SAP Security Notes
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to stay up to date regarding SAP Security Notes (from here: https://me.sap.com/app/securitynotes).

However I dislike having to frequently check manually via the website.
My question: Is it possible to receive updates for existing nodes and new notes via an RSS feed or per email?

I've found that inside my personalization options I can choose to get notified by mail when an update occurs, however that applies only to single notes I marked "as favourites".

I would much appreciate a pointer to the functionality or community-built tooling, I imagine this is a frequent request.

An alternative feed for all new knowledge base notes that I need to filter down would work for me as well.

Best, Philipp

entry.title: BAS: Workflow UI (MTA) deployment error
entry.content:
I'm trying to create workflow task UI using BAS's template "Workflow UI".

Reference blog - Create an SAP UI5 Task for a Business Process | SAP Tutorials

I'm able to deploy this app in my trial account and it is working as expected but when I'm deploying the same app in the client's subaccount, it throws error: Error monitoring creation or update of services: Error creating service "ApprovalApp-destination-service" from offering "destination" and plan "lite": Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Failed to create a destination service instance with the user provided configuration. 

I'm able to deploy Freestyle SAPUI5 apps and CAPM apps in the same subaccount and destination service(plan-lite) instance is also getting created successfully. It throws this error only in case of Workflow UI app it seems.

 

If anyone has encountered a similar scenario or has insights into this issue, your suggestions or assistance would be greatly appreciated.
 
Thanks in advance for your support.
 
Best regards,
Adarsh

entry.title: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unknown AuthenticationType: OAuth2AuthorizationCode
entry.content:
I am using cloud sdk from SAP to call destinations  When calling get Destination OAuth2AuthorizationCode I am facing  using java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unknown AuthenticationType: OAuth2AuthorizationCode where from postman it works 

var xCode =
    "eyJ0eXAiOiJNVCIsImFsZyI6IlJTMjU2Iiwia2lkIjoiNjgxODVmZjEtNGU1MS00Y2U5LWFmMWMtNjg5ODEyMjAzMzE3In0.AQoAAAABAAYABwAAci95DZfdSAgAAP61wA2X3UgCACrPp79qcoFHvHlgZjaTogEVAAEAAAAYAAEAAAAFAAAADQAkAAAANGJmMWQwYjAtNDJmMS00ZDI3LWFkOGYtYzY5OTZjNmZjZWJkIgAkAAAANGJmMWQwYjAtNDJmMS00ZDI3LWFkOGYtYzY5OTZjNmZjZWJkEgABAAAABwAAAG1hbmFnZWQwAICHGk_ult1I.Nh_g-HYIn2XuPfj4OeDzg_IF29jmC2AXAh0qUpulcCT1oOs8uZ7olwKrdpVwO__CD8zDY62EsispULEHBRYz4LEqSs63JINherln1NMb5qv9WGNKnTKWFz-sqXZnTsoz9l5a2zSB6o7ym_bda2R_ycE0bXW2dE0PVF6rCE83Vu9r6a0-6OupC18wC1_H1VVVfTyiiwsn2W3vkwRLLQvA_BL_6HvLt4p3ZEfOTGyZV9uq7E8xxl-BEqi2Ft1BhFMjl64E-sYu25Ritt3UdIRloqYz1XVEvObvrgzTkjmkiF57CY9uwqdq6Rw0YkpB1ZJDSYbOeGKkxgjy1L2sIYrg2w";
final DestinationOptions options = DestinationOptions.builder()
    .parameter("X-code", code)
    .build();
var service = new DestinationService();
Destination destination = service.tryGetDestination(this.destinationName, options).get();

 

<dependency>
  <groupId>com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform</groupId>
  <artifactId>cloudplatform-connectivity</artifactId>
  <version>5.18.0</version>
</dependency>

entry.title: Purchasing Category Supplier Evaluation Shows No Results
entry.content:
Hello,
I have created several purchasing categories for the S/4HANA supplier evaluation in Fiori and defined different scores and weightings for them. However, no results are displayed in the purchasing category, for example when I call up Supplier Evaluation by Time with a filter for the purchasing category.
Did I forget a step?
What do I need to do to display the supplier evaluation per purchasing category?

Report: MM_PUR_SEWS_VAR_SCORE_UPDATE → updated successfully

Thank you very much in advance! 🙂

 

Edit/Answer 27.05.25: Each purchasing category must be assigned material groups.

entry.title: QR-Code on Dunning forms
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a question regarding the printing of QR-Codes on Dunning forms for our company in Austria. We want to simplify the payment process for our customers by offering them a QR-Code by which they can easily get the relevant payment infos in their bank payment apps. This has nothing to do with the swiss QR-Iban-system. E.g. we want to print a QR-Code which includes the name and IBAN of our company, the payment reference and amount of the open items on the dunning form. So here is the question, do you know if there is an easy way to set up that in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Many thanks for your input and help!

BR Katrin

entry.title: SAPUI5 Smartfiterbar odata v2 vs macro:filterbar odata v4 typeAhead value suggest
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have two apps, one a bit older using SmartFilter bar on odata V2, and a new one in Flexible Programming model using odata v4.

In the old one fields annotated with a ValueHelp offer automatically some suggested values when the user starts typing. In the new one ValueHelps are there, but suggested values do not show up.
It seems to be possible in the macro bar here:
https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/filterBar/filterBarVMWithTable

So how can i achieve the same? This is one of my Value Help annotations:

<li-code lang="abap"><li-code lang="abap">@UI.lineItem       : [{position: 10}]
      @ui.selectionField : [{position: 10}]
      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
             entity      : {
                 name    : 'YLYR_WBS_ELEMENT_R',
                 element : 'WBSElement'
             },
             additionalBinding: [{
                 localElement: 'ShortID',
                 element : 'ShortID',
                 usage   : #FILTER
            }]
         }]
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'WBSDescription' ]

  key WBSElement         : ps_posid;

Regards,
Michal

entry.title: Issue with MultiComboBox after upgrade to UI5 version 1.120.14
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Recently we have upgraded our HANA version from 2020 to 2023 and also the UI5 version from 1.84 to 1.120.14.

After upgrade the MultiComboBox  is not working as expected in the Custom Fiori Applications, the dropdowns values are unable to unselect. 

OnAfterrendering by default we are setting all values are selected but when we try to unselect its not working. Its working fine in the non upgraded system. 

Can someone suggest how to fix this issue ? Found one below note which is for combobox not Multicombobox. Does this apply for Multicombobox aswell ? Please suggest 

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003553710

 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: UI5 Fast Navigation (F6) and ColumnListItem: Unexpected Behavior When Buttons Are Present
entry.content:
Hello, colleagues!

I’m reaching out to share an accessibility issue I’ve encountered in a project, hoping someone has either faced the same challenge or found a neat workaround.

We are implementing keyboard accessibility support, and part of that involves enabling group skipping using the F6 key — allowing users to move between logical sections or groups of the page, as recommended by SAP accessibility guidelines.
We are using a sap.m.Table with ColumnListItems that represent Appliance Templates. Each row contains some textual information and several action buttons (like Create, Edit, Activate, etc.). Here's the issue:

When pressing F6, instead of jumping from one Appliance Template (i.e., row) to the next, the focus cycles through the buttons inside the first row, then jumps into the buttons of the next row. The expected behaviour would be the following - the Focus should skip from one group (row) to another group, not within internal elements.

 

 

 

 

 

We’ve explored several options to make the ColumnListItem (or its internal layout like HBox) behave as a fast navigation group:

  • Setting data-sap-ui-fastnavgroup="true" via core:CustomData

  • Adding tabindex="0" and role="group"

  • Importing @ui5/webcomponents-base/dist/features/F6Navigation.js (note: relevant mostly for Web Components)

  • Restructuring layout elements like HBox, VBox, OverflowToolbar

  • Removing buttons entirely — and with no buttons, F6 works perfectly

  • Replacing multiple buttons with a single overflow menu button (partially helps)

But none of these worked when the buttons were inside the ColumnListItem.

Thank you in advance! 🙂 

Kind regards,
Silvio

entry.title: Hide the controller file while inspecting in browser for sapui5
entry.content:
Hi,

In my UI5 applications on right clicking at the browser and navigating to Sources Tab , am able to see the all the controller files and on selecting the controller the code is also visible, is there any way to hide the code ?

once the application is moved to production we don't want end users or others to inspect and open the controller code.

Kindly help and do the needful

entry.title: custom Font family ( Gilroy)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am using Rich text editor control in sapui5 application,

1.Need to define "Gilroy font" in drop selection

2. add water mark in my document download from rich text editor.

could you please let know to achieve the functionality.

regards,

Nagaraj J

entry.title: Enable Now Manager LDAPS - Unsupported signature algorithm (after licensing)
entry.content:
Hello,

we are using Enable Now Manager onPremise and use LDAPS for User authentication.

It has been working fine until we added the license (before it wasn´t licensed).

Now we always get the error: ldapserver:636 [Root exception is javax.net.ssl.SSLException: Unsupported signature algorithm (rsa_pss_rsae_sha256) used in CertificateVerify handshake message]

After I restart the tomcat, I can login with a LDAP user, but only once. Then the same error occurs.

There is no problem logging in with a local user, only problems with ldap, only when the license is activated.
I deleted the license again from the database, so that we can login.

What happens when I activate the license, that might change TLS or LDAP settings or similar?

Manager Version: 10.8.5
Tomcat: 9.0.105
Java:  JRE 21
Windows Server 2019

Thanks in advance! Much appreciated!

Alec

entry.title: BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR: Unable to each runtime server
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a Business Process project using SAP Build Process Automation, and I’ve encountered a runtime server issue when trying to import the task UI of the workflow. The error message displayed is:

 

Process followed : 

1. Verify the HTML5 Applications in BTP :

2. Import your SAP UI5 form in SAP Build Process Automation



3. Filled the Import Form details:

 

Issue  : 





What I’ve Tried

  • Verified that all services in SAP BTP Cockpit are up and running.

  • Checked for any missing form configurations or deployment issues.

  • Tried redeploying the process and re-authenticating with my BTP account.

What I Need Help With

  • What exactly causes the BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR?

  • Are there specific services or destinations that must be enabled for the runtime server to be reachable?

  • Has anyone faced similar issues when working with SAP Build Process Automation forms or workflows?


    Environment Details

    • SAP BTP: Cloud Foundry environment

    • Service: SAP Build Process Automation

    • Use Case: Custom workflow with Task UI used for approvals

 

 

If anyone has faced and resolved this issue or has any insights your help would be greatly appreciated. Please feel free to share possible causes or diagnostic steps to try.

Thanks in advance!

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: MultiInput in a table with item binding doesn't add tokens on Initial copy paste from excel
entry.content:
Our Fiori application's Object Page has a custom Facet, which has a table with item binding. The table cells have a multiInput field and a ValueHelp button. Please find the image attached below


We have a customer requirement wherein customers wish to paste multiple values from an excel file directly into a multi Input field in a single paste, which gets pasted as Tab Separated values.

When tab separated values are pasted into any of the above Multi Input fields for the first time, the initial paste gets omitted and only the last value from the tab separated values appear in the field.

Additional Information:
1) Even with addValidator added to the MultiInput field, the Tokens only get added when item binding is removed from the table. (Note: This issue only occurs for the first paste of the input, before any tokens have been added).
This is the addValidator function

oMultiInput.addValidator(function(args){
					var text = args.text;
					return new sap.m.Token({key: text, text: text});
			});


2) Furthermore, the change and tokenUpdate events don't seem to get triggered for this paste. However, the liveChange event does get triggered, which could potentially be used for a workaround (Not preferred).

3) The tokenUpdate event : 

onTokenUpdate: function (oControlEvent) {
    if (oControlEvent.getParameters().type == "removed") {
        var oRemovedTokens = oControlEvent.getParameters().removedTokens[0];
        var oObjectPageView = this.getObjectPageView();
        var oModel = oObjectPageView.getModel();
        var oAttribModel = oObjectPageView.getModel("AttributeLocal");
        if (oRemovedTokens) {
            var tokenKey = oRemovedTokens.data("Key0");
            var attributeKey = oRemovedTokens.data("Key1");
            var dTeamID = oRemovedTokens.data("Key2");

            var sPath = "/C_RespyMgmtTeamAttributeTP(RespyMgmtTeamAttributeValueID=\'" + attributeKey + "\'" +
                ",RespyMgmtTeamID=\'" + dTeamID + "\'" + ",DraftUUID=guid\'" + tokenKey + "\'" + ",IsActiveEntity=false)";

            oModel.remove(sPath, {
                success: function (oData) {
                    var resArray = oAttribModel.getProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData");
                    var delFlag = false;
                    for (var k = 0; k < resArray.length; k++) {
                        if (resArray[k].DraftUUID === tokenKey && !delFlag) {
                            resArray.splice(k, 1);
                            oAttribModel.setProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData", resArray);
                            delFlag = true;
                        }
                    }
                    oModel.refresh(true);
                },
                error: function (oError) {
                }
            });
        }
    }
    if (oControlEvent.getParameters().type == "added") {
        for (var i = 0; i < oControlEvent.getParameters().addedTokens.length; i++) {
            var oMultiInput = oControlEvent.getSource();
            var oAttributeValue = oControlEvent.getParameters().addedTokens[i].getAggregation("customData")[0].getValue().value1;
            oMultiInput.setValue("");
            if (oAttributeValue) {
                var oAttributeName = oMultiInput.data("coords0");
                var attributeUnit = oMultiInput.data("Key5");
                var attributeCurrency = oMultiInput.data("Key6");
                // code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
                var oTokenParser = new TokenParser();
                oTokenParser.addKeyField({
                    key: oAttributeName,
                    label: oAttributeName,
                    type: "string"
                });
                oTokenParser.setDefaultOperation("EQ");
                oTokenParser.associateInput(oMultiInput);
                var oNewToken = oMultiInput._validateToken({
                    text: oAttributeValue
                });

                var temp = 0;
                var oRange = oNewToken.data().range;
                var option = oRange.operation;
                var Low = oRange.value1;
                Low = Low.toUpperCase(Low);
                var High = oRange.value2;
                if (High) {
                    High = High.toUpperCase(High);
                }
                var Exclude = oRange.exclude;
                if (option === "Contains" || option === "StartsWith" || option === "EndsWith") {
                    temp = this.checkEscapeCharacter(Low);
                    Low = this.operatorChangeForRanges(Low, option, temp);
                    option = "CP";
                }
                // end of code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
                var oObjectPageView = this.getObjectPageView();
                var oModel = oObjectPageView.getModel();
                var oAttribModel = oObjectPageView.getModel("AttributeLocal");
                var oBindingContext = oObjectPageView.getBindingContext();
                var sPath = oBindingContext.getPath();
                sPath = sPath + "/to_Attribute";
                var DraftUUID = oBindingContext.getObject().DraftUUID;
                var data = {
                    ParentDraftUUID: DraftUUID,
                    RespyMgmtReferenceAttribName: oAttributeName,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeOption: option,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeSign: Exclude ? "E" : "I",
                    RespyMgmtAttributeLowValue: Low,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeHighValue: High,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeUnit: attributeUnit,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeCurrencyKey: attributeCurrency
                };
                oModel.create(sPath, data, {
                    success: function (oData, oResponse) {
                        oData.RespyMTeamAttributeIsEditable = true;
                        var resArray = oAttribModel.getProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData");
                        resArray.push(oData);
                        oAttribModel.setProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData", resArray);
                        oModel.refresh(true);
                    },
                    error: function (oError) { }
                });

            }
        }
    }
},

4) The change event : 

onInputAttribute: function (oControlEvent) {
			var oMultiInput = oControlEvent.getSource();
			var oAttributeValue = oControlEvent.getParameters().value;
			oMultiInput.setValue("");
			if (oAttributeValue) {
				var oAttributeName = oMultiInput.data("coords0");
				var attributeUnit = oMultiInput.data("Key5");
				var attributeCurrency = oMultiInput.data("Key6");
				// code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
				var oTokenParser = new TokenParser();
				oTokenParser.addKeyField({
					key: oAttributeName,
					label: oAttributeName,
					type: "string"
				});
				oTokenParser.setDefaultOperation("EQ");
				oTokenParser.associateInput(oMultiInput);
				var oNewToken = oMultiInput._validateToken({
					text: oAttributeValue
				});

				var temp = 0;
				var oRange = oNewToken.data().range;
				var option = oRange.operation;
				var Low = oRange.value1;
				Low = Low.toUpperCase(Low);
				var High = oRange.value2;
				if (High) {
					High = High.toUpperCase(High);
				}
				var Exclude = oRange.exclude;
				if (option === "Contains" || option === "StartsWith" || option === "EndsWith") {
					temp = this.checkEscapeCharacter(Low);
					Low = this.operatorChangeForRanges(Low, option, temp);
					option = "CP";
				}
				// end of code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
				var oObjectPageView = this.getObjectPageView();
				var oModel = oObjectPageView.getModel();
				var oAttribModel = oObjectPageView.getModel("AttributeLocal");
				var oBindingContext = oObjectPageView.getBindingContext();
				var sPath = oBindingContext.getPath();
				sPath = sPath + "/to_Attribute";
				var DraftUUID = oBindingContext.getObject().DraftUUID;
				var data = {
					ParentDraftUUID: DraftUUID,
					RespyMgmtReferenceAttribName: oAttributeName,
					RespyMgmtAttributeOption: option,
					RespyMgmtAttributeSign: Exclude ? "E" : "I",
					RespyMgmtAttributeLowValue: Low,
					RespyMgmtAttributeHighValue: High,
					RespyMgmtAttributeUnit: attributeUnit,
					RespyMgmtAttributeCurrencyKey: attributeCurrency
				};

				oModel.create(sPath, data, {
					success: function (oData, oResponse) {
						oData.RespyMTeamAttributeIsEditable = true;
						var resArray = oAttribModel.getProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData");
						resArray.push(oData);
						oAttribModel.setProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData", resArray);
						oModel.refresh(true);
					},
					error: function (oError) {}
				});

			}
		}

entry.title: How to implement hierarchical filtering in TreeTable in SAPUI5?
entry.content:
I'm using the sap.ui.table.TreeTable in SAPUI5 to display hierarchical data (like multi-level BOMs). I want to implement filtering so that when a child node matches the filter, its parents are still visible to maintain the tree structure.

Issue:

Currently, when I use standard filtering (via filter Property on columns), it only filters visible rows. If a match is found in a nested/child node that is collapsed, it doesn’t show up, and its parent is not included either.

Expected Behavior:

If a child or deeper node matches the filter condition:

  • The entire path (i.e., parent → child) should be visible

  • Tree structure should be preserved

  • Filter should work recursively on all levels

Actual Behavior:

  • Filtering only applies to currently visible rows

  • Deep nested matches are ignored unless parent is expanded

  • Filtered result appears empty, even when matching values exist

What I Tried:

I implemented a custom recursive filter on the JSON model before binding to the TreeTable:


This works partially, but:

  • Breaks expand/collapse logic

  • Loses lazy-loading benefits

  • Not ideal for large datasets

My Questions:

  1. Is there a standard way to implement hierarchical filtering in Tree table?

  2. Can Tree table support full-depth filtering while maintaining structure?

  3. Are there any recommended workarounds or best practices?

  4. Is this feature on SAP’s roadmap?

Thanks in advance! Open to all suggestions, links, or alternative approaches.

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:table="sap.ui.table"
    xmlns:m="sap.m">

    <table:TreeTable
        id="idTreeTable"
        rows="{
            path: 'myModel>/Items',
            parameters: {
                arrayNames: ['Children']
            }
        }"
        selectionMode="MultiToggle"
        enableColumnReordering="true"
        alternateRowColors="true"
        visibleRowCount="10">

        <table:columns>
            <table:Column filterProperty="Name" width="20%">
                <m:Label text="Name"/>
                <table:template>
                    <m:Text text="{myModel>Name}" />
                </table:template>
            </table:Column>

            <table:Column filterProperty="Type" width="15%">
                <m:Label text="Type"/>
                <table:template>
                    <m:Text text="{myModel>Type}" />
                </table:template>
            </table:Column>
        </table:columns>

    </table:TreeTable>

</core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" when Consuming Decision Table API(SBPA)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a decision table in SAP Build Process Automation and have successfully released and deployed the project. Following this, I created a trigger from the deployed decision table.

However, when I try to consume this API via Postman, I encounter the following error message:

"The rule service with given id xxxxxxxxxxxxx does not exist."

Has anyone come across this error before? Any insights or suggestions to resolve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Smart Variant Management in 1.71.67 - IT IS NOT WORKING
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a app using version 1.71.67. It need to have variant management feature in the filter bar. 
I am using smart variant management (sap.ui.comp.smartvariant) and filterbar (sap.ui.comp.filterbar). 

I can see the smart variant management in the UI but it doesnt work normally. 
The normal event flow : getFiltersWithValue > fetchData.
In my app : fetchData. 

I think because of this, the variant management doesnt work.
Is there any way, i can use the variant management in this version ? 
Or, we have to use the Variant Management instead ? do you have any sample code ? ( because the one in the API reference is not working as well ) 



Thanks!

entry.title: How to filter the list when the column is 1:n relation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a webapp using SAP Business Application Studio in BTP. 

The app is connected to S4 HANA Cloud system using oData v2 API

I have view which is a list of products. I want to add a search box to filter the result by Production Description column. Production and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I am using the below source codes. But it doesn't work. 

I get the error in the console - Error during request to remote service: Left hand expression of memberaccess operator has wrong cardinality (to many not allowed)

Can someone please help me?

 

                var aTableSearchState =[];
                var sQuery = oEvent.getParameter("query");

                if (sQuery && sQuery.length > 0) {
                    var ProductTypeFilter = new Filter("ProductType", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var MaterialFilter = new Filter("Material", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var LanguageFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Language", FilterOperator.EQ, 'EN');
                    var DescriptionFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Description", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var QueryFilter1 = new Filter({ filters:[LanguageFilter, DescriptionFilter], and: true});
                    //var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter], and: false});
                    var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter, QueryFilter1], and: false});
                    aTableSearchState.push(QueryFilter);
                }
                this._applySearch(aTableSearchState);
 
         
_applySearch: function(aTableSearchState) {
          
           var oTable = this.byId("table"),
           oViewModel = this.getModel("worklistView");
            oTable.getBinding("items").filter(aTableSearchState, "Application");
            // changes the noDataText of the list in case there are no filter results
            if (aTableSearchState.length !== 0) {
                oViewModel.setProperty("/tableNoDataText", this.getResourceBundle().getText("worklistNoDataWithSearchText"));
            }

        }
